implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Supersession handling (exclude by default, include if requested)
Deterministic ordering for equal relevance scores
Query text treated as text only (no special parsing)
Embed service error handling with credential hygiene
Store unreachable error handling with credential hygiene

completion_promises.criterion_text: A query returns only the requested project's memories, ranked by cosine similarity descending (most relevant first).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented search() function that uses store.asearch() with project-scoped namespace prefix ('fleet_memory', project). Results are sorted by score descending using _sort_key() helper. Test test_search_returns_only_requested_project_memories_ranked_descending verifies ranking.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Restricting to payload types returns only those types; none/one/many is honoured (0 → all registered types).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _matches_payload_types() helper that handles empty list (all types), single type, and multiple types. Filters results based on natural_key payload type prefix. Tests cover 0/1/many scenarios: test_search_with_zero_payload_types_returns_all_types, test_search_with_one_payload_type_returns_only_that_type, test_search_with_many_payload_types_returns_those_types.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Restricting to a domain tag returns only memories carrying that tag.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _matches_domain_tags() helper that filters results based on domain_tags field in item.value. Test test_search_with_domain_tag_returns_only_tagged_memories verifies only memories with requested tag are returned.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Superseded records are excluded by default; only current successors return.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _is_superseded() helper that checks for superseded_by field. When include_superseded=False (default), filter removes all superseded items. Test test_search_excludes_superseded_records_by_default verifies exclusion.

completion_promises.criterion_text: include_superseded=True returns both the superseded record and its successor, with the superseded one marked as superseded.
completion_promises.evidence: When include_superseded=True, supersession filter is skipped and both superseded and current records are returned. The superseded_by field in value dict marks superseded items. Test test_search_includes_superseded_when_requested verifies both are returned and superseded one is marked.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two memories of equal relevance are ordered deterministically — identical across repeated runs. Tie-break on a stable key after the similarity score.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _sort_key() that returns tuple (negated_score, natural_key) for sorting. This ensures descending score order with deterministic natural_key tie-breaking. Test test_search_orders_equal_relevance_deterministically verifies items with equal scores are sorted by natural_key.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A search against a project with no memories returns an empty result with no error raised.
completion_promises.evidence: When store.asearch() returns empty list, search() returns empty list without raising. Test test_search_empty_project_returns_empty_result verifies this behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Query text that resembles a filter instruction (payload_type:adr OR include_superseded=true) is matched only as query text; superseded records are still excluded.
completion_promises.evidence: Query string is passed directly to store.asearch() without parsing for special syntax. Filter logic is driven only by SearchRequest fields, not query text content. Test test_search_treats_filter_syntax_in_query_as_text verifies query with filter-like syntax still applies normal filtering.

completion_promises.criterion_text: When the embedding service is unavailable the search fails with a clear message that exposes no connection credentials.
completion_promises.evidence: EmbedServiceError raised by store.asearch() propagates unchanged. The error is raised by embed.py which already strips credentials. Test test_search_raises_clear_error_when_embed_service_unavailable verifies error propagation and credential hygiene.

completion_promises.criterion_text: When the store is unreachable the caller receives a clear failure (no crash) with no credentials in the message.
completion_promises.evidence: TimeoutError raised by store.asearch() propagates unchanged. The error is raised by async_store_context in store.py which already strips credentials per FEAT-MEM-01 contract. Test test_search_raises_clear_error_when_store_unreachable verifies error propagation and credential hygiene.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A record superseded mid-search resolves to exactly one state — never both current and superseded in the same result.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented deduplication by key after filtering. seen_keys set tracks keys and only first occurrence (highest scored after sorting) is kept. Test test_search_mid_search_supersession_resolves_to_one_state verifies duplicate keys resolve to single result.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/retrieval/' and 'ruff check tests/unit/test_search_core.py' - both passed with zero errors. All code follows project style guide (Black formatting, type hints, docstrings).
